query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN research_field IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as classified,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN research_field IS NULL THEN 1 END) as unclassified,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM professors;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT

  COUNT(CASE WHEN research_field IS NULL THEN 1 END) as unclassified,
  COUNT(*) as total
